meaning: adj.多猎物的,味道强的,勇敢的
examples: Food pairing: it is suitable for gamy meat and blue cheese.
I threw open the suitcase and revealed the huge, hairy, gamy object...
Cooked whale meat, we discovered, had the consistency of tuna tartare and a slightly gamy flavor.
The plot is ridiculous, but Mamet dramatizes this gamy material with tremendous solemnity.
